summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatEmbed AI - German SaaS chatbot builder. Backend APIs are highly functional (90.9% success rate) with working auth, chatbot CRUD, and Claude AI integration. Frontend loads correctly with German content, cookie consent, and navigation, but has minor UI interaction issues in auth forms.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Expected behavior - test user may not exist in database

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay preventing form submission - element intercepts pointer events
Minor interaction issues with Accept All button timing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with German content
Navigation to all legal pages (pricing, impressum, datenschutz, agb)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix registration form overlay issue preventing form submission. The form fields are working but there's a div element intercepting click events on the submit button. Also ensure test user credentials are properly seeded in database for testing.
